source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/01_HAD1717MC, MG/DHF/02. Master Schedule/KGMP 심사용/(참조용) 디텍터 개발 일정.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Detector Master Plan lists detector development milestones across 2018 and 2019.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Reference schedule for detector development activities and completion milestones.
keyPoints: Schedule begins with MRD review on 4/6 and development plan drafting on 4/13.
Design, mechanical design, circuit design, sample build, FPGA, FW, and SW design activities are listed through July.
Internal performance tests, evaluation meetings, reliability testing, and document distribution are listed before production preparation.
Development completion and mass-production transfer document distribution are listed for 5/22.

entities.name: KGMP
entities.evidence: sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/01_HAD1717MC, MG/DHF/02. Master Schedule/KGMP 심사용/(참조용) 디텍터 개발 일정.xlsx

evidence.claim: The document title is Detector Master Plan.
The schedule covers columns for 2018 and 2019.
Development plan drafting and approval is listed on 4/13.
Detector Design is listed on 5/3 and Detector Design Review is listed on 5/4.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector Design 설계,,,,5/3; Detector Design Review,,,,5/4

evidence.claim: Mechanical design and circuit design/artwork are listed on 6/8.
evidence.evidenceText: 기구 설계,,,,,6/8; 회로 설계 및 Artwork,,,,,6/8

evidence.claim: Sample production is listed on 6/29 and again on 9/21.
FPGA, FW, and SW design are each listed on 7/27.
Reliability testing is listed from 10/25 to 12/11 with a note that 12/11 is the quality reliability completion date.
Development completion and mass-production transfer document distribution are listed on 5/22.
